common.unsavedMessage: They will be lost if you leave now.

preview.tip: Print and place on tables, or share online.
preview.tableTip: Print and place on this table. Scanning opens the menu with this table preselected.

ai.translateReplaceMessage: This will overwrite what you've already typed in this field.
ai.describeTip: Describe what you want, then tap Generate.
ai.promptTip: Tip: mention angle, lighting, or background.
ai.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Margherita pizza on a wooden board, top-down view
ai.quotaRemaining: {remaining} of {limit} free AI images left. Subscribe for unlimited.
ai.quotaExceededMessage: You've used all {limit} free AI image generations. Subscribe to any plan for unlimited AI images.

menu.title: Menu
menu.subtitle: Manage your categories and dishes.
menu.noCategoriesSub: Add your first category to start building the menu.

step.addCategory: By tapping this button, you'll add a new category (for example: Desserts, Drinks, Mains).
step.addDish: By tapping this button, you'll add a dish to a category.
step.edit: By tapping this pencil, you'll open the editor. For a category — rename. For a dish — name, price, photo, description, allergens, translations.
step.toggleDish: By tapping this eye, you'll hide or show a dish to guests. The dish itself is not deleted.
step.sort: By tapping these arrows, you'll change the order of categories and dishes. What's on top is seen by guests first.
step.preview: By tapping this button, you'll open a preview of the menu — what a guest sees after scanning the QR.
step.share: By tapping this button, you'll get the link and the QR code of your menu, ready to print.

banner.title: Upload your paper menu
banner.subtitle: Snap a photo or upload a PDF — AI will parse all items into categories for you.

upload.description: Upload photos or a PDF of your paper menu. AI will parse it into categories and items.
upload.hint: Maximum 5 files. Need more? Contact support and we'll help.

loading.secondary: This may take up to a minute

review.description: AI parsed {total} items in {cats} categories. Uncheck the ones you don't want.

confirm.prompt: You have {existing} items already in your menu. What should happen with them?
confirm.replaceDescription: Delete all {existing} existing items and keep only the new {selected}.
confirm.keepDescription: Add the new {selected} items on top of your current menu.
confirm.examplesNote: Example items will be removed in both cases.

categoryForm.deleteMessage: This will also delete all dishes inside it. This cannot be undone.
categoryForm.nameRequiredMessage: Enter a category name in the default language before saving.

dishForm.optionsTip: Variants like sizes, extras, or add-ons.
dishForm.visibleTip: Hidden dishes don't appear in the menu.
dishForm.deleteMessage: This dish will be removed from the menu.
dishForm.nameRequiredMessage: Enter a dish name in the default language before saving.
dishForm.priceRequiredMessage: Enter a valid price (e.g. 12.50) before saving.
dishForm.missingMessage: Enter a name and a valid price before saving.

optionForm.multiTip: Off — guest picks one. On — guest picks any number.
optionForm.requiredTip: Guest can't add to cart without choosing.
optionForm.variantsTip: Each variant has a name and an optional price modifier.
optionForm.deleteMessage: This option will be removed from the dish.
optionForm.missingMessage: Enter an option name and at least one variant before saving.
optionForm.nameRequiredMessage: Enter an option name in the default language before saving.
optionForm.variantRequiredMessage: Add at least one variant with a name in the default language before saving.

orders.title: Orders
orders.noActiveSub: Tap a free table on the map to start an order, or wait for guests to place one via the QR menu.
orders.tapTable: Tap a table on the map to see or start an order.
orders.deleteOrderMessage: This will permanently remove the order and all its items. This action cannot be undone.
orders.allServed: All items served. Ready to complete.
orders.multiPickHint: Pick one or more, then Continue.
orders.kitchenClearSub: Items will appear here as guests place orders.
orders.noTablesSub: Add tables in settings to start tracking orders by table.
orders.splitOrderHint: Pick items to move into a new order
orders.completeOrderUnservedMessage: Some items are not served yet. Complete order anyway?
orders.noActiveBody: New orders will show up here.

reservations.title: Bookings
reservations.noBookingsSub: Once guests book a table, you'll see them here.
reservations.disabledBody: Enable bookings in settings to start receiving them.
reservations.noTablesBody: Add your tables in settings before accepting bookings.
reservations.dayClosedBanner: Restaurant is closed on this day.
reservations.pendingEmptyBody: New bookings awaiting your confirmation will show up here.

tables.title: Tables
tables.tapTable: Tap a table on the map to edit it.
tables.name: Name
tables.formTip: Tap anywhere on the floor plan to place this table. Adjust seats and number with the steppers, then save.
tables.cantDeleteMessage: Table {number} has active orders or upcoming bookings. Resolve them first, then try again.
tables.deleteMessage: Table {number}{label} will be removed from the floor plan.
tables.emptySubtitle: Add your first table to enable reservations and per-table QR codes.

about.title: About
about.showTitleTip: Displayed on the homepage of your public website.

contacts.title: Contacts & location
contacts.contactsTip: Shown on the contacts page of your public menu.
contacts.locationTip: Address and map shown on your public contacts page. Search or tap the map to set the pin.

branding.title: Branding
branding.accentTip: Main color for buttons and highlights.
branding.showTitleTip: Display restaurant name over the background image on the public menu homepage.
branding.backgroundTip: Shown as the homepage background of your public website.
branding.aiPlaceholder: e.g. Cozy candlelit table with rustic plates and warm wood

general.title: General
general.menuLinkTip: Your unique URL where customers can view your menu.
general.slugError: Use 2–40 lowercase letters, digits, or hyphens.
general.currencyTip: Used for prices in your menu.

orders.title: Orders
orders.acceptTip: When off, guests can browse the menu but can't place orders.
orders.modeTip: Internal orders are saved in the dashboard. WhatsApp orders are sent directly to your WhatsApp. You can enable both.
orders.requiredFieldsTip: Enabled fields will be required for the customer to fill in when placing an order.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.enableTip: When off, guests can browse the menu but can't reserve a table.
bookings.modeManualTip: You will need to manually confirm each reservation.
bookings.durationTip: How long a table is held per booking.
bookings.hoursTip: Reservations can be made within these hours.

error.hours: Start time must be before end time.
error.lunchOutside: Lunch break must be within working hours.

bookings.timezoneTip: Used to compute reservation slot times in your local clock.

languages.title: Languages
languages.availableTip: Pick the languages you want for your menu. Tap to add or remove.
languages.defaultTip: The language you write your menu in first. Other languages are translations of this one.
languages.translatingBody: Please wait — we're translating every dish and category into the languages you added. Don't close this window.

billing.title: Billing
billing.menuUnavailableTip: Your trial has expired and there is no active subscription. Customers cannot scan and view your menu until you choose a plan.
billing.trialEnds: Trial ends on {date}. Choose a plan to keep your menu available.
billing.cancelTip: Cancel anytime via the customer portal. Yearly plans renew once per year.

settingsHub.title: Settings
settingsHub.subtitle: Manage your restaurant, team, and account.

rows.contactsDesc: Phone, Instagram, WhatsApp, address pin on the map.
rows.brandingDesc: Accent color, homepage name visibility, background image or video.
rows.tablesDesc: Floor plan, per-table seats and QR codes.
rows.ordersDesc: Enable orders, in-app or WhatsApp mode, required guest fields.
rows.bookingsDesc: Enable reservations, auto or manual confirmation, working hours.
rows.languagesDesc: Languages your public menu is translated into.
rows.supportDesc: Chat with our team in real time.

analyticsDashboard.title: Analytics
analyticsDashboard.subtitle: Menu views and performance.
analyticsDashboard.noDataLong: Once guests scan your menu, traffic and engagement metrics will appear here.

auth.title: Create your menu
auth.subtitle: Enter your email to get started. We'll send you a one-time code — no password needed.

consent.text: By continuing you agree to our

auth.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.sendFailed: Couldn't send the code. Try again.
errors.verifyFailed: Couldn't verify the code. Try again.
errors.codeExpired: This code expired. Request a new one.
errors.noCode: No code on file. Request a new one.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait and try again later.

step1.title: What kind of place?
step1.subtitle: We'll preload a sample menu so you can start with something to edit, not a blank page.

step2.title: Name your restaurant
step2.subtitle: This is what guests will see at the top of your menu. You can change it later.

step3.title: Almost there
step3.subtitle: Confirm your email to save your menu and unlock the dashboard.
